jsonDefinition: {"name":"UserService.lookupV2","summary":"Resolve a user, cache-first","description":"Reads from Redis, falls back to DB, re-caches.","buttonLabel":"Lookup User","internalMethod":false,"inputs":[{"fieldCode":"userId","label":"User ID","type":"TEXT","required":true,"testValue":"42"}],"variables":[{"fieldCode":"resolvedUser","label":"Resolved User","type":"JSON","hideInput":true,"orderIndex":-1}],"outputs":[{"code":"resolvedUser","displayName":"User","type":"JSON"}],"assertions":[],"securityFields":[],"services":[{"orderIndex":1,"description":"Cache read","automationId":"svc-a","activeTab":{"id":"existingService"},"automationApiId":22929,"mappings":[{"value":"","uiRepresentation":"OBJECT","automationUserInputId":41954,"mappings":[{"value":"user:#{userId}","uiRepresentation":"CUSTOM","automationUserInputId":41955},{"value":"PERSISTENT","uiRepresentation":"DROPDOWN","automationUserInputId":41956}]}],"outputs":[{"code":"cacheResult","automationAPIOutputId":20593}],"forceExitFromFailure":false}]}
